title: 10 Signs of a Man Who Walks Humbly
caption:
Humility isn't what the culture sold you.

The culture made it small — quiet, passive, the man who apologizes for taking up space. That's not humility. That's cowardice in a costume.

Biblical humility looks like a man who can look any man in the eye and still get on his knees. Sturdy, not soft. Secure enough to be corrected. Strong enough to give credit away.

"He has told you, O man, what is good; and what does the Lord require of you but to do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God?" — Micah 6:8.

Walk humbly. Not shrink humbly. Walk.

Save this and send it to a man you respect.

#christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #faithoverfear #humility #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #christianity #scripture #faith
